title: salix × ambigua
intro: Salix × ambigua, also known as the weeping willow hybrid, is a deciduous shrub or small tree that is a cross between the weeping willow (Salix babylonica) and the white willow (Salix alba). The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties due to the presence of salicin, a compound similar to aspirin. The health benefits of Salix × ambigua include reducing pain and inflammation, as well as treating fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions. Salix × ambigua can be prepared for medicinal use through herbal preparations such as infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health issues.
